summary: Iteration 2 improvements: (1) Added 8 high-quality Taiwan family venues to seed data (Taipei Zoo, Shilin Children's New Park, Youth Park, Mackay Hospital Pediatrics, Taipei 101 Nursing Room, Happy Taiwan Family Restaurant, Taichung Children's Park, E-DA Theme Park Kaohsiung) — total locations now ~50; (2) Added fuzzy search endpoint /api/locations/fuzzy-search with SequenceMatcher-based typo tolerance for better UX; (3) Added trending venues endpoint /api/locations/trending with proximity boost, quality score, and crowdedness activity signals; (4) Added fuzzySearch and getTrending methods to frontend API service; (5) Added recentlyViewed utility with localStorage persistence (dedup, max 10 entries); (6) Added 13 new server tests for fuzzy search, trending, and new locations (232 total, up from 219); (7) Added 11 new client tests for new utilities (2536 total, up from 2525). All previous tests continue to pass.
next_action: All quality gates passed. System now has richer data coverage, smarter search, and trending discovery features.
